premium.title: Premium Features
premium.subscriptionDesc: Continuous development requires financial support. Subscribe to unlock:
premium.unlockAllFeatures: Unlock all features below with a premium subscription
premium.serviceFeeDesc: A small fee per trade supports long-term project development and maintenance
premium.samplingPoolDesc: Provide AI with deeper historical data for better trend analysis
premium.aiPromptGeneratorDesc: Generate professional trading strategy prompts through natural language conversation with AI
premium.technicalIndicatorsDesc: 11 professional-grade technical indicators across trend, momentum, and volatility analysis
premium.aiQuantAnalysisDesc: Deep learning-powered market microstructure analysis with multi-dimensional signal extraction
premium.aiSignalGeneratorDesc: Transform trading ideas into executable signals using natural language - no technical knowledge required
premium.classicalFormations: Classical formations: Head & Shoulders, Double Top/Bottom, Triangles, Wedges
premium.candlestickPatterns: Candlestick patterns: Doji, Engulfing, Hammer, Shooting Star, Morning/Evening Star
premium.entryExitZones: Entry/Exit zone recommendations with probability scoring
premium.riskRewardCalc: Risk/Reward ratio calculation and position sizing guidance
premium.naturalLanguageToSignalDesc: Describe what you want to monitor: "Alert me when BTC open interest surges with high buying pressure"
premium.smartParamOptimizationDesc: AI analyzes market data to suggest optimal thresholds - no guesswork needed
premium.multiConditionLogicDesc: Combine CVD, OI, funding rate, order flow into sophisticated AND/OR signal pools
premium.triggerAiTradingDesc: Bind signals to AI accounts - when conditions hit, AI evaluates and executes

prompt.useCaseHint: For strategies needing AI analysis (news, sentiment)
prompt.createNewTemplateDesc: Create a new prompt template from scratch. It will be initialized with the default template content.

exchange.selectToStart: Select an exchange to start trading
exchange.compareDesc: Compare features and data collection methods
exchange.switchTo: Data collection and trading will switch to
exchange.referralTip: Register through our referral links to enjoy fee discounts and support the platform development.

wallet.privateKeyHint: 64 hex chars (0x auto-added). DEX needs private key to sign on-chain transactions.
wallet.addressWarning: This looks like a wallet ADDRESS (40 chars), not a private key (64 chars).
wallet.invalidFormat: Invalid format. Private key must be 64 hex characters.
wallet.multiWalletDesc: Each AI Trader can have separate wallets for testnet (paper trading) and mainnet (real funds). Configure both to seamlessly switch between environments without reconfiguring.

agent.securityWarning: Your wallet currently stores the master private key, which has full access to transfer funds. Upgrading to an API Wallet restricts access to trading only — even if compromised, funds cannot be withdrawn.
agent.viewTutorial: How to get an API Wallet (Step-by-step Guide)
agent.tutorialTitle: How to Create an API Wallet
agent.tutorialStep1: Open the API page, enter a name, and click "Authorize API Wallet"
agent.tutorialStep2: Copy the Private Key shown in the popup
agent.tutorialStep2Warning: This key is only shown ONCE. If you close this popup without copying it, you will need to create a new API Wallet.
agent.tutorialStep3: Copy your Master Wallet Address from the top-right corner
agent.bothFieldsRequired: Both API Wallet Private Key and Master Wallet Address are required
agent.invalidAgentKey: Invalid API Wallet private key format

strategy.title: Strategy Configuration
strategy.description: Configure trigger parameters and Hyperliquid watchlist
strategy.noSignalPoolsAvailable: No signal pools available. Create one in the Signals tab.
strategy.triggerWhenMet: Trigger when signal pool conditions are met
strategy.triggerWhenAnyMet: Trigger when ANY selected pool conditions are met (OR relationship)
strategy.multiPoolWarning: Note: If multiple pools trigger simultaneously, only the first will execute (others are ignored while running).
strategy.scheduledTriggerDisabled: Scheduled trigger is disabled. AI will only run on signal pool triggers.
strategy.noTriggerWarning: Warning: This AI Trader has no active trigger method. It will not execute any trades until you enable scheduled trigger or bind a signal pool.
strategy.enabledDesc: Enabled: strategy reacts to signals and scheduled triggers.
strategy.samplingHint: How often to collect price samples (default: 18s)
strategy.watchlistMoved: Watchlist management has been moved to Settings.
strategy.exchangeHint: Select exchange for market data and trade execution

accountDetail.binanceWeightInfo: Binance API weight resets every minute. Each API call consumes different weight.

attribution.title: Attribution Analysis
attribution.dataWarning: Legacy AI decision data is incomplete. Some analysis dimensions may have missing data.
attribution.notice: Attribution analyzes AI decision performance only, not overall wallet performance. Data comes from local AI decision logs. Legacy data may be incomplete.
attribution.syncWarning: {{count}} trade(s) have not synced PnL data. Statistics may be inaccurate.
attribution.operationTooltip: Shows AI's decision intent. Buy/Sell may trigger position closure if opposite position exists (e.g., Buy while holding short = close short), resulting in realized PnL.

bot.telegramDesc: Connect a Telegram bot to chat with Hyper AI from Telegram.
bot.tokenHint: Get your bot token from @BotFather on Telegram
bot.webhookHint: Leave empty to auto-detect. Must be HTTPS for Telegram.
bot.connectDesc: Follow these steps to connect your bot.
bot.step1Desc: Open Telegram and search for @BotFather, or click the link below:
bot.step1Send: Send this command to create a new bot:
bot.step2Combined: Follow BotFather's instructions to set a name and username. Once done, paste the token below:
bot.manageDesc: Your bot is connected. You can change it below.
bot.notificationDesc: Configure which events trigger push notifications to your connected bots.

discord.name: Discord Bot
discord.desc: Connect a Discord bot to chat with Hyper AI from Discord DM.
discord.step1Desc: Open Discord Developer Portal and create a new Application:
discord.step1a: Click "New Application" and give it a name
discord.step1b: Go to "Bot" in the left sidebar
discord.step1c: Click "Reset Token" to generate a bot token
discord.step2a: In the Bot settings page, scroll down to "Privileged Gateway Intents"
discord.intentNote: Without this, the bot cannot read your messages in DM.
discord.step3Desc: Now paste your bot token below:
discord.howToChat: Follow these steps to chat with Hyper AI:
discord.dmStep1: Click the link above to add the bot to any server
discord.dmStep2: In Discord, find the bot in the server member list
discord.dmStep3: Right-click the bot → "Message" to start a DM

telegram.howToChat: Click below to start chatting with Hyper AI:

factors.name: Factor
factors.noData: No effectiveness data yet. The engine computes daily at UTC 01:00.
factors.noSymbols: No symbols in watchlist. Configure watchlist in Settings first.
factors.forwardPeriodHint: How far ahead to predict returns (not K-line period)
factors.confirmCompute: This will compute factor values and effectiveness for all watchlist symbols across all prediction windows.
factors.alreadyRunning: A computation is already running. Please wait.
factors.icTooltip: Information Coefficient: correlation between factor and future returns. Higher |IC| = stronger prediction. Positive = same direction, negative = inverse.
factors.icirTooltip: IC Information Ratio: IC stability over time. Higher |ICIR| = more consistent prediction, not just a fluke.
factors.winRateTooltip: Percentage of times factor direction matched future price direction. Above 55% is considered strong.
